markdownRemark.html:
NOTE: This app is still in development, more info & images coming soon

The best way to pick, collect and organize your colors.

Features

  • ◉ Color picker with magnifier to select the perfect color from your desktop
  • ◉ Create and edit color palettes
  • ◉ Color Editor to find and edit colors without using other softwares
  • ◉ Shortcuts to help you pick colors faster
  • ◉ Choose from many formats (HEX,RGB,HSL,HSV)

Download
